summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Hestia Hotel Management Platform with Supabase migration. Backend APIs mostly functional (84% success rate), frontend login working but authentication persistence issues found.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 due to missing Supabase function 'increment_guest_stats'

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: UUID validation error for guest_id parameter
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Use valid UUID format for guest_id

ui_bugs.issue: Login successful but authentication state not persisting on page refresh/navigation

integration_issues.issue: After successful login, navigating to root URL redirects back to login page

passed_tests: API root endpoint returns Supabase confirmation (v2.0.0)
Login API with admin@hestia.com works (200 OK)
Hotels, rooms, guests, reservations endpoints functional
AI chat with authenticated users works
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication persistence issue in frontend - tokens not being maintained across page navigation. Fix missing Supabase function 'increment_guest_stats' for check-out process. Investigate dashboard stats API 500 errors.
